message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
left to right direction
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "SalesClerk" as SalesClerk
package "«presentation»\nDefineNewCategoryUI" as DefineNewCategoryUI {
}

SalesClerk -> DefineNewCategoryUI : 1 Define new category
activate DefineNewCategoryUI
DefineNewCategoryUI --> SalesClerk : 2 asks user information
SalesClerk -> DefineNewCategoryUI : 3 Code, Description
DefineNewCategoryUI --> SalesClerk : 4 displayCategoryInfo
deactivate DefineNewCategoryUI

@enduml
```
